title: Simply Craftmine
description: Simply Craftmine is an optimization modpack for 25w14craftmine, the April Fools snapshot for the never-released Craftmine Update.
body:
Simply Craftmine is an optimization modpack for 25w14craftmine, the April Fools snapshot for the never-released [Craftmine Update](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/article/the-craftmine-update). It's recommended to launch this with Prism Launcher! Modrinth App occassionally fails to launch the pack. ## What is 25w14craftmine?

25w14craftmine is one of the yearly April Fools updates for Minecraft, in which normal progression has been replaced by the new Mine Crafter block, which allows players to progress through custom dimensions (called Mines), slowly levelling up over time. ## Running a Mine In a Mine, you must survive long enough to reach the exit. Time spent in the mine gathering resources can be used to level up your player through a new skill tree system. Over time, you'll also find new mine ingredients which can be used to customize the generated mines. ## Mod List + Mod Licenses Every mod in this pack has been handpicked to be compatible with 25w14craftmine, including some custom ports. If you know/have made any mods that would fit in the pack, send them my way! Looking to develop mods for Craftmine? Try my fork of the [Fabric Example Mod](https://github.com/cassiancc/fabric-example-mod). - AppleSkin by squeek502, from Modrinth. - [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) by shedaniel, from Modrinth - [BugMine](https://modrinth.com/mod/bugmine) by Mikarific, from Modrinth. - [Client Sort](https://modrinth.com/mod/clientsort) by TerminalMC, from Modrinth. - [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) by shedaniel, from Modrinth. - [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) by IMS21, released as an unstable build by ims21 in the [Iris Discord server](https://discord.com/channels/774352792659820594/883067831485366304/1356710831152169242)- distributed in accordance with its [LGPL License](https://github.com/ComplementaryDevelopment/ComplementaryReimagined/blob/main/License.txt). - [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (C2ME)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) by ishland, from Modrinth. - [Connected Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/connected-doors) by Domi, from Modrinth - [CraftMineFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftminefix) by DialingSpoon527, from Modrinth - [CraftMine Biome Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftmine-biome-fix) by JoshuaBradbury, from Modrinth. - [Ender Christmas Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/ender-christmas+) by cassiancc, from Modrinth. - [Exchange Value Tracker](https://modrinth.com/mod/exchange-value-tracker) by haykam, from Modrinth. - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) by modmuss50, from Modrinth - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) by modmuss50, from Modrinth. - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) from malte0811. - [I Can't Believe It's Not 1.21.5](https://github.com/Chocohead/I-Cant-Believe-Its-Not-1.21.5) by Chocohead, from Modrinth. - [Item Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-descriptions) by cassiancc, from Modrinth - [Immersive Overlays](https://modrinth.com/project/immersive-overlays) by cassiancc, from Modrinth. - [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) by IMS21, released as an unstable build by ims21 in the [Iris Discord server ](https://discord.com/channels/774352792659820594/883067831485366304/1356710730749182063)- distributed in accordance with its [LGPL License](https://github.com/IrisShaders/Iris/blob/multiloader-new/LICENSE). - [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) by Snownee, from Modrinth. - [JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap) by mysticdrew, from Modrinth. - [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) by LambdAurora, from Modrinth. - [Logical Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/logical-zoom) by LogicalGeekBoy, from Modrinth - [MidnightControls](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightcontrols) by Motschen, from Modrinth. - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) by Prospector, from Modrinth. - [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) by YaLTeR, from Modrinth. - [Raised](https://modrinth.com/mod/raised) by yurisuika, from Modrinth. - [Reliable Recipe Viewer](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrv) by cassiancc, from Modrinth. - [Screenshot to Clipboard](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-to-clipboard) by comp500, using a [custom fork](https://github.com/cassiancc/ScreenshotToClipboard/tree/25w14craftmine) by cassiancc and distributed under its [MIT License](https://github.com/comp500/ScreenshotToClipboard/blob/1.20-arch/LICENSE). - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) by jellysquid3, using a [fork by Mikarific ](https://github.com/Mikarific/sodium/releases)released on GitHub- distributed in accordance with its [Polyform Shield License](https://github.com/CaffeineMC/sodium/blob/dev/LICENSE.md). - [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api) by Patbox, from Modrinth - [ToolTipFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltipfix) by kyrptonaught, using an [updated fork](https://github.com/BlueStaggo/tooltipfix/tree/1.21.2) by BlueStaggo and distributed under its [MIT License](https://github.com/kyrptonaught/tooltipfix/blob/1.21/LICENSE). - [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) by isxander, from Modrinth.
